name: MoneyGram
description_short: MoneyGram at 3827 Independence Ave, Kansas City, MO provides check cashing, money transfers, and bill payment services with extended daily hours.
description_long:
MoneyGram at 3827 Independence Ave is a standalone check-cashing location in Kansas City, MO offering fast financial services to local residents. Open Monday through Saturday from 9AM to 8PM and Sundays from 10AM to 7PM, this Kansas City branch is conveniently located for quick visits during lunch breaks or after work.

This MoneyGram location in Kansas City provides check cashing, money transfer services, bill payment options, and other essential financial services. You can reach the branch at +1 816-231-5443 to confirm services or get answers to specific questions about rates and processing times.

When visiting this Kansas City, MO location, bring a valid government-issued ID and any documents needed for your specific transaction. Whether you need to cash a check, send money domestically, or pay bills, MoneyGram offers convenient access to these services at this central Independence Avenue location.
pros: Extensive network with 26+ locations in Kansas City area alone across multiple partner retailers
Extended operating hours through partner locations, with many open until 8-11 PM including weekends
Multiple access methods: online transfers and in-person service at physical locations
Partnership with trusted major retailers (Walmart, CVS) and community-focused establishments
Simple location search functionality by address, city, state, or ZIP code
Both sending and receiving money capability through same platform
Established global service enabling international transfers, not just domestic
cons: Fees and exchange rates not disclosed on website, making true cost comparison impossible without visiting locations
Service limited to money transfers; cannot build credit, access loans, or establish banking relationships
Dependent on partner location hours and availability rather than proprietary control over service points
No information provided about security, fraud protection, or dispute resolution processes
Requires visiting physical location or managing transfers online without integrated account management features
best_for: Customers needing to send money internationally without traditional banking relationships
Unbanked or underbanked consumers requiring convenient, extended-hours money access
Individuals receiving remittances from family or business partners abroad
People needing quick money transfers without establishing long-term financial accounts
diagnosis: MoneyGram is best for unbanked or underbanked consumers and those needing international money transfers who value convenience and extended hours over comprehensive financial services. The primary caveat is that this is purely a money transfer service with undisclosed fees—it does not build credit, provide loans, or offer banking products, and true costs cannot be evaluated without direct contact with locations.
services: In-person transfer services at partner locations
Cash pickup services at partner retailers
meta_description: MoneyGram at 3827 Independence Ave, Kansas City, MO. Check cashing, money transfers, and bill payment services with extended hours.
